citation_and_locator: Lee, Man Ki Theodora. 2014. Negative wh-quantifiers in Cantonese: a syntactic proposal and an investigation of adult English-Cantonese interlanguage. PhD thesis, University of York; pp. 24–25 and chapter 6
what_it_supports: Cantonese `bin1go3 dou1` and preverbal object `mat1je5 dou1` with universal everyone/everything readings; wh forms require contextual licensers for noninterrogative force.
limit: Does not establish a distinct bare-wh modal freedom-of-choice construction or a complete wh-form/environment matrix.

citation_and_locator: Hsu, Yu-Yin and Anqi Xu. 2020. Wh-indeterminates and Prosody in Hong Kong Cantonese. Speech Prosody 2020:376–380
what_it_supports: Interrogative/indefinite ambiguity of `mat1je5` and prosodic/SFP disambiguation.
limit: Does not test universal or free-choice `wh + dou1` syntax.

citation_and_locator: Zheng, Zhang and Gao. 2021. Hong Kong Cantonese course; user PDF pp. 155 and 296
what_it_supports: Free-choice persons, times, and places in `是但/隨便 … 都得` examples.
limit: Overt free-choice licensor and `dak1` cannot be omitted from the evidential claim; examples do not prove bare `wh + dou1` free choice.
